title: Better Weapons
description: A mod that adds new weapons such as the dart that comes in 3 varients the iron dart, the diamond dart and the netherite dart
body: This mod is a mod that adds new weapons that I made. This mod helps with your weapon desires wanna kill a zombie with a dart you can do that wanna kill a skeleton with a new weapon you can! This mod has a lot of new weapons so please check it out.
